    1. CACHE_MODE

Interface Persistence.CacheProperties

All Known Implementing Classes:
PersistenceConfiguration
Enclosing class:
Persistence
public static interface Persistence.CacheProperties
Properties used to configure the second-level cache.
Since:
4.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    CACHE_MODE
    String specifying a SharedCacheMode.

  • Field Details

    • CACHE_MODE

      static final String CACHE_MODE
      String specifying a SharedCacheMode.

      Defined for use with Persistence.createEntityManagerFactory(String, Map). Clients of the PersistenceConfiguration class should use PersistenceConfiguration.sharedCacheMode(SharedCacheMode).

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
